title: No output displayed for pinned modules in n8n 1.113.0
symptom: After updating to n8n version 1.113.0, no output is shown for individual modules when pinned and run as a test. Users must check the executions tab to see the output.
not_this_if: Output is visible in the executions tab
root_cause: This issue appears to be a bug introduced in the latest version of n8n, affecting how the editor displays output for pinned modules. It may be related to caching or rendering issues in the user interface.
fix_steps: Hard reload the n8n editor (Cmd/Ctrl-shift-r) or open it in incognito mode.
Unpin the module, run it once, then pin it again and run.
Toggle the Run view to refresh the output display.
agent_instruction: Try hard reloading the editor and re-running the pinned module to see if the output appears.
